briefdescription.para: Key is not on the curve.
Incorrect hash length for sign verification.
r is greater than curve order
s is greater than curve order
This function validates the ECDSA public key.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to EcdsaCrvInfo structure containing curve parameters
- Pointer to EcdsaKey structure containing public key (Qx, Qy)

listitem.para: ELLIPTIC_KEY_WRONG_ORDER - If key has wrong order
ELLIPTIC_KEY_NOT_ON_CRV - If key is not on the curve

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the ECDSA signature.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to EcdsaCrvInfo structure containing curve parameters
- Pointer to hash of the message to verify
- Length of the hash in bytes
- Pointer to EcdsaKey structure containing public key (Qx, Qy)
- Pointer to EcdsaSign structure containing signature (r, s)

listitem.para: ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_INCORRECT_HASH_LEN - If hash length is incorrect
ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_R_ZERO - If signature component r is zero
ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_S_ZERO - If signature component s is zero
ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_R_ORDER_ERROR - If r is greater than curve order
ELLIPTIC_VER_SIGN_S_ORDER_ERROR - If s is greater than curve order

memberdef.argsstring: (EcdsaCrvInfo *CrvInfo, u8 *Hash, u32 HashLen, const u8 *D, const u8 *K, EcdsaSign *Sign)
memberdef.name: Ecdsa_GenerateSign

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to EcdsaCrvInfo structure containing curve parameters
- Pointer to hash of the message to sign
- Length of the hash in bytes
- Pointer to EcdsaSign structure to store generated signature (r, s)

listitem.para: ELLIPTIC_GEN_SIGN_BAD_R - If generated r component is invalid
ELLIPTIC_GEN_SIGN_BAD_S - If generated s component is invalid
ELLIPTIC_GEN_SIGN_INCORRECT_HASH_LEN - If hash length is incorrect

briefdescription.para: This function generates ECDSA public key from private key.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to EcdsaCrvInfo structure containing curve parameters
- Pointer to EcdsaKey structure to store generated public key (Qx, Qy)

listitem.para: ELLIPTIC_SUCCESS - On successful public key generation

briefdescription.para: < ECDSA compact code for RSA5X API definitions
Return value in case of success.
